title: Identity Preserved Luxury Fashion Editorial Edit AI
sourceTitle: Identity Preserved Luxury Fashion Editorial Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image identity-preserved luxury fashion editorial photoshoot for adult creative professional with relaxed gaze and clear facial structure. Subject: adult creative professional with relaxed gaze and clear facial structure describes the local source/reference image for this image-to-image template. adult creative professional with relaxed gaze and clear facial structure keeps exact uploaded facial features, eyes, eyebrows, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, face proportions, hairstyle texture, and natural likeness while adopting fixed pose language detail. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Vertical 9:16 fashion editorial composition with refined tailoring, clean silhouette, subject separation, exact identity preservation, and fixed magazine mood detail hierarchy. Signature Elements: Absolute face preservation, tailored charcoal-grey blazer, fitted black turtleneck, wide-leg trousers, black ankle boots, delicate silver necklace, minimalist earrings, luxury wristwatch, refined pose, clean studio or luxury-location composition, and premium Vogue editorial mood. Style: Ultra-realistic luxury fashion campaign photography with modest contemporary styling, Vogue editorial lighting, premium fabric detail, photoreal skin texture, direct fashion flash, and high-end magazine finish. Color Palette: Light-grey or location-matched luxury neutrals, charcoal tailoring, black base layers, silver accessory highlights, realistic skin tones, and clean premium contrast. Lighting: Canon EOS R5 Mark II fashion-photo language, 85mm lens look, powerful direct fashion flash, crisp shadows, bright catchlights, glossy skin highlights, dramatic subject separation, and ultra-sharp facial detail. Camera: 85mm vertical 9:16 fashion editorial framing, high-resolution photorealism, crisp facial focus, full outfit readability, and polished campaign perspective. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
